# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: low-latency-service
        image: low-latency-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-proxy
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database-proxy
        image: database-proxy:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: DB_HOST
          value: "postgres.database.svc.cluster.local"
        - name: DB_PORT
          value: "5432"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-proxy
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-analytics
  namespace: analytics
spec:
  replicas: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-analytics
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: realtime-analytics
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: analytics-engine
        image: realtime-analytics:v1.2.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9091
          protocol: TCP
          name: metrics
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 9090
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 9090
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-analytics
  namespace: analytics
spec:
  selector:
    app: realtime-analytics
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
  - name: metrics
    port: 9091
    targetPort: 9091
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
        tier: cache
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - cache-service
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          protocol: TCP
        command:
        - redis-server
        - --maxmemory
        - "2gb"
        - --maxmemory-policy
        - allkeys-lru
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "3Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: cache-data
          mountPath: /data
      volumes:
      - name: cache-data
        emptyDir: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: cache-service
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: message-queue
  namespace: messaging
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: message-queue
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: message-queue
        component: broker
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: rabbitmq
        image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5672
          protocol: TCP
          name: amqp
        - containerPort: 15672
          protocol: TCP
          name: management
        env:
        - name: RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: rabbitmq-secret
              key: username
        - name: RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: rabbitmq-secret
              key: password
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "750m"
          limits:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1500m"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: rabbitmq-data
          mountPath: /var/lib/rabbitmq
      volumes:
      - name: rabbitmq-data
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: rabbitmq-pvc
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: message-queue
  namespace: messaging
spec:
  selector:
    app: message-queue
  ports:
  - name: amqp
    port: 5672
    targetPort: 5672
    protocol: TCP
  - name: management
    port: 15672
    targetPort: 15672
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: legacy-tcp-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: legacy-tcp-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: legacy-tcp-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: tcp-server
        image: legacy-tcp-service:1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8888
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: legacy-tcp-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: legacy-tcp-service
  ports:
  - port: 8888
    targetPort: 8888
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-api
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: high-throughput-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: high-throughput-api
        performance: critical
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api-server
        image: high-throughput-api:2.1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: ENABLE_METRICS
          value: "true"
        - name: MAX_CONNECTIONS
          value: "10000"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 20
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
          limits:
            memory: "4Gi"
            cpu: "4000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-api
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    app: high-throughput-api
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: monitoring-agent
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: monitoring-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: monitoring-agent
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: monitoring-agent-sa
      containers:
      - name: agent
        image: monitoring-agent:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9100
          protocol: TCP
        securityContext:
          privileged: true
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: monitoring-agent
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  selector:
    app: monitoring-agent
  ports:
  - port: 9100
    targetPort: 9100
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
